symptoms.symptom_name: Superficial crusted scaly seborrhoeic-distribution patches with peeling

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Superficial crusted patches in a seborrhoeic distribution with peeling are characteristic.

symptoms.symptom_name: Mucosa clear; afebrile; no punched-out erosions

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No punched-out erosions/grouped vesicles/systemic illness argues against herpeticum.
Mucosal sparing argues strongly against SJS.

symptoms.symptom_name: Superficial peeling crusts (not thick honey-coloured/purulent); aggravated by harsh shampoos

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Superficial peeling without thick honey-coloured purulent crusts argues against impetigo.
Aggravation by harsh shampoos and superficial peeling fit pemphigus foliaceus.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Dermatology review with skin biopsy + direct immunofluorescence
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms pemphigus foliaceus (anti-desmoglein-1) and excludes mimics.
Not indicated without evidence of impetigo/herpeticum (retained only in the safety-net).
